entries.source: A free AI learning companion for people teaching themselves.
entries.value: Un compagnon d’apprentissage IA gratuit pour les personnes qui apprennent seules.

entries.source: A free AI tutor for students who want to understand, not copy.
entries.value: Un tuteur IA gratuit pour les étudiants qui veulent comprendre, pas copier.

entries.source: A good family AI workflow should make the learner more independent, not more dependent. Parents can use public pages to see what each mode is meant to do before a child starts.
entries.value: Un bon flux IA familial devrait rendre l’apprenant plus autonome, pas plus dépendant. Les parents peuvent utiliser les pages publiques pour voir ce que chaque mode est censé faire avant qu’un enfant commence.

entries.source: A parent-friendly guide to inspir's public AI learning modes for homework hints, explanation, study routines, flashcards, and safer learning conversations.
entries.value: Un guide adapté aux parents sur les modes publics d’apprentissage IA d’inspir pour les indices de devoirs, les explications, les routines d’étude, les cartes mémoire et des conversations d’apprentissage plus sûres.

entries.source: A student, parent, teacher, and self-taught learner often search for the same AI tutor in different language. Separate pages make the right use cases and safety boundaries clearer.
entries.value: Un étudiant, un parent, un enseignant et un autodidacte recherchent souvent le même tuteur IA avec des mots différents. Des pages séparées rendent les bons cas d’usage et les limites de sécurité plus clairs.

entries.source: inspir is for students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners who need focused AI learning modes for explanations, questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir s'adresse aux élèves, parents, enseignants et autodidactes qui ont besoin de modes d'apprentissage par IA ciblés pour les explications, les questions, les indices, les quiz, les flashcards, les retours et la planification des études.

entries.source: inspir is organized into focused modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, source critique, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir est organisé en modes ciblés comme le tutorat socratique, les indices pour les devoirs, les quiz, les flashcards, les retours sur l'écriture, la critique des sources et la planification des études.

entries.source: inspir's public modes let teachers evaluate the product through real learning flows before considering a school deployment or a tailored classroom pathway.
entries.value: Les modes publics d'inspir permettent aux enseignants d'évaluer le produit dans de vrais parcours d'apprentissage avant d'envisager un déploiement scolaire ou un parcours de classe sur mesure.

entries.source: Search intent
entries.value: Intention de recherche

entries.source: self-taught learner
entries.value: apprenant autodidacte

entries.source: Self-taught learners need momentum and structure. inspir helps turn curiosity into a path: explain, build, test, review, and keep going.
entries.value: Les apprenants autodidactes ont besoin d’élan et de structure. inspir aide à transformer la curiosité en parcours : expliquer, construire, tester, réviser et continuer.

entries.source: Start a topic from first principles
entries.value: Commencer un sujet à partir des premiers principes

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Commencer à apprendre

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, then ask Socratic questions until you can explain it back.
entries.value: Commencez par une explication simple, puis posez des questions socratiques jusqu’à pouvoir la reformuler.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything for a simple explanation, Homework Coach for a stuck assignment, or Flashcard Builder when the goal is review.
entries.value: Commencez par Learn Anything pour une explication simple, Homework Coach pour un devoir qui bloque, ou Flashcard Builder lorsque l’objectif est de réviser.

entries.source: Start with public guidance, then open the right mode.
entries.value: Commencez par les conseils publics, puis ouvrez le bon mode.

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the moment.
entries.value: Commencez par le mode qui correspond au moment.

entries.source: Start with the public modes, then use the schools page to review deployment steps, use cases, and trust boundaries.
entries.value: Commencez par les modes publics, puis utilisez la page des écoles pour examiner les étapes de déploiement, les cas d’usage et les limites de confiance.

entries.source: Student homework, parent support, teacher evaluation, and self-study all need different framing.
entries.value: Les devoirs des élèves, le soutien parental, l’évaluation par les enseignants et l’autoformation nécessitent chacun un cadrage différent.

entries.source: Students need fast help, but the help still has to leave the thinking in their hands. inspir routes common study moments into focused public modes instead of one generic answer box.
entries.value: Les élèves ont besoin d’une aide rapide, mais cette aide doit quand même leur laisser la réflexion en main. inspir oriente les moments d’étude courants vers des modes publics ciblés plutôt que vers une boîte de réponses générique.

entries.source: Students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners search for different things. These pages route each audience to the right public mode, guide, and study workflow.
entries.value: Élèves, parents, enseignants et apprenants autodidactes ne cherchent pas la même chose. Ces pages orientent chaque public vers le bon mode public, le bon guide et le bon flux d’étude.

entries.source: Support writing while preserving voice
entries.value: Soutenir l’écriture tout en préservant la voix

entries.source: Teachers need more than a generic chatbot. They need predictable learning behaviors: ask questions, check reasoning, generate practice, preserve student voice, and make misconceptions visible.
entries.value: Teachers need more than a generic chatbot. They need predictable learning behaviors: ask questions, check reasoning, generate pratique, preserve student voice, and make misconceptions visible.

entries.source: The audience pages make the expected learning behavior explicit so the first session starts with better judgment.
entries.value: Les pages par public rendent explicite le comportement d’apprentissage attendu afin que la première séance commence avec un meilleur jugement.

entries.source: The audience searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: The audience searches this hub is built to réponse.

entries.source: The pages do not expose private conversations. They organize public modes, prompts, guides, workflows, and safety boundaries so a learner can start in the right place.
entries.value: The pages do not expose private conversations. They organize mode publics, prompts, guides, flux de travails, and safety boundaries so a apprenant can start in the right place.

entries.source: The same AI tutor can be a homework hint, a parent-supervised explain-back loop, a teacher evaluation surface, or a self-study coach. The page should make that clear.
entries.value: Le même tuteur IA peut être un indice pour les devoirs, une boucle d’explication supervisée par les parents, une surface d’évaluation pour les enseignants ou un coach d’autoformation. La page doit le rendre clair.

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: Les recherches auxquelles cette page est conçue pour répondre.

entries.source: The self-study challenge is not just finding information. It is choosing the next right action and knowing whether the idea actually stuck.
entries.value: Le défi de l’autoformation n’est pas seulement de trouver de l’information. C’est de choisir la bonne prochaine action et de savoir si l’idée a vraiment tenu.

entries.source: The strongest SEO pages do not strand a learner. They connect the audience intent to paths, workflows, guides, and repeatable review.
entries.value: Les pages SEO les plus fortes ne laissent pas l’apprenant isolé. Elles relient l’intention du public à des parcours, flux de travail, guides et révisions répétables.

entries.source: The strongest student workflow is not answer-copying. It is a loop: explain the stuck point, ask one better question, get a hint, try again, then review the miss.
entries.value: Le meilleur flux de travail étudiant n’est pas la copie de réponses. C’est une boucle : expliquer le blocage, poser une meilleure question, obtenir un indice, réessayer, puis revoir l’erreur.

entries.source: These are live guest entrypoints. They are public and indexable, while private user conversations stay outside sitemap and AI discovery files.
entries.value: Ce sont des points d’entrée invités en direct. Ils sont publics et indexables, tandis que les conversations privées des utilisateurs restent hors du sitemap et des fichiers de découverte IA.

entries.source: These phrases are visible to learners and included in structured discovery so AI answer engines can understand the audience-specific purpose of the page.
entries.value: Ces expressions sont visibles pour les apprenants et incluses dans la découverte structurée afin que les moteurs de réponse IA comprennent l’objectif propre au public de la page.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a quiz or flashcard before moving on.
entries.value: Transformez confusion en a quiz or flashcard avant de continuer.

entries.source: Turn mistakes into review
entries.value: Transformer les erreurs en révision

entries.source: Turn the first click into a complete learning loop.
entries.value: Transformez the first click en a complete learning loop.

entries.value: Tutorat

entries.value: Comprendre un sujet avant le contrôle

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: Utilisez a mode tuned for indices, questions, quiz, flashcards, retours d’écriture, or planning.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: Utilisez AI for indices, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or Project Coach to turn a vague goal into a small testable next step.
entries.value: Utilisez Code Tutor or Project Coach to turn a vague goal into a small testable next step.

entries.source: Use hint-first and explain-back workflows for homework support.
entries.value: Utilisez indice d’abord and réexplication workflows for aide aux devoirs.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach to ask for a hint, then ask the learner to explain the next move.
entries.value: Utilisez Homework Coach to ask for a hint, then ask the learner to explain the next move.

entries.source: Use inspir as a free AI tutor for students: homework hints, Socratic questions, math step checks, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and exam prep.
entries.value: Utilisez inspir as a free AI tutor for students: homework indices, questions socratiques, vérifications d’étapes en maths, retours d’écriture, quiz, flashcards, and préparation aux examens.

entries.source: Use inspir to learn anything independently with explanations, code tutoring, project coaching, research help, concept maps, study plans, and habit support.
entries.value: Utilisez inspir to learn anything independently with explanations, code tutoring, project coaching, research help, cartes conceptuelles, plans d’étude, and soutien aux habitudes.

entries.source: Use Learn Anything to get a simpler model, prerequisite ideas, and examples at the right level.
entries.value: Utilisez Learn Anything to get a simpler model, prerequisite ideas, and examples at the right level.

entries.source: Use public mode descriptions to choose the behavior before a session starts.
entries.value: Utilisez public mode descriptions to choose the behavior before a session starts.

entries.source: Use quiz and flashcard modes for active recall, then route missed items into review.
entries.value: Utilisez quiz and flashcard modes for active recall, then route missed items into review.

entries.source: Use quizzes and flashcards to make missed questions visible and repeatable.
entries.value: Utilisez quiz and flashcards to make missed questions visible and repeatable.

entries.source: Use quizzes, flashcards, and Socratic questions so the learner shows what they understand.
entries.value: Utilisez quiz, flashcards, and questions socratiques so the learner shows what they understand.

entries.source: Use Research Assistant, Source Critic, and Concept Map Builder to organize claims and evidence.
entries.value: Utilisez Research Assistant, Source Critic, and Concept Map Builder to organize claims and preuves.

entries.source: Use source critique for claims you might cite or act on.
entries.value: Utilisez critique des sources for claims you might cite or act on.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder and Habit Coach to build a routine that can restart after missed days.
entries.value: Utilisez Study Plan Builder and Habit Coach to build a routine that can restart after missed days.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder or Habit Coach to make small sessions and restarts visible.
entries.value: Utilisez Study Plan Builder or Habit Coach to make small sessions and restarts visible.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder to choose a small goal, then use quizzes, flashcards, project steps, or concept maps to prove progress.
entries.value: Utilisez Study Plan Builder to choose a small goal, then use quiz, flashcards, project steps, or cartes conceptuelles to prove progress.

entries.source: Use the school page to explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, and rollout steps.
entries.value: Utilisez the school page to explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, and rollout steps.

entries.source: Use Writing Coach for feedback on structure, clarity, evidence, and revision priorities.
entries.value: Utilisez Writing Coach for feedback on structure, clarity, preuves, and revision priorities.

entries.source: Useful AI learning has a clear contract.
entries.value: Un apprentissage utile avec l’IA repose sur un contrat clair.

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Oui. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
